$comment: Hash-pin manifest for vendored SHACL shapes (ADR-0014 Phase 1). Each entry pins a vendored shape's exact content (sha256) so a shape cannot change silently. `npm run check:shapes` recomputes every file's hash and fails on drift. To update a shape: re-vendor from `source.repo`, bump `source.commit`, recompute `sha256`, and commit the new lock in the SAME change as the .ttl. Do NOT hand-edit a vendored .ttl — it must stay byte-identical to its upstream source so the hash is verifiable against that source.

shapes/task.ttl.describes: The SHARED federated Task/Issue model (@jeswr/solid-task-model). The cross-app common denominator of the suite's wf:Task contract: title (dct:title), body (BOTH wf:description AND dct:description), assignee (wf:assignee), timestamps, and the binary wf:Open/wf:Closed state. PM writes wf:Task via src/lib/issues.ts (now delegating to @jeswr/solid-task-model), so this shape advisory-validates PM issue writes for federation compatibility with solid-issues and every other suite app. Byte-identical to the package's shapes/task.ttl (== taskShapeTtl()), asserted in shapes-lock.test.ts.
